occ_894.text: -- ── [이슈1] 점당단가 governed: NULL → data_incomplete BLOCK (89.4 fallback 제거, §2-2-1b) ──

fn_comment: 건보 본인부담 산출 v1.3 — [이슈1]점당단가 governed(hira_unit_value NULL→data_incomplete BLOCK, 89.4 fallback 제거) + [이슈2]노인 외래 정률제 4구간(≤15k=1500/≤20k=10%/≤25k=20%/>25k=30%). NULLFIX v1.2 default-deny 흡수(subsume). (T-20260713-foot-HIRA-UNIT-VALUE-2026-UPDATE, SSOT §2-2-0/1/3)
